info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: udyamanam = udDaraRam iti DAtukAvyavyAKyA  (2.82) ' gurate (gU) gUrayeteti Se RO udyamane taNi  Syani gUryata ityevaM gatihiMsanayoH taNi ' (Slo. 152) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'pra mandayurmanAM gUrta hotA Barate maryo miTUnA yajatraH' (f॰1.173.2) atra prapUrvo guratiruccEraBisamboDane vartate pragUrta iti sambudDiH he udgurRendra iti sAyaRaH yaTA tu saMskftaSArmaRyakozakArO paSyatastaTA pragUrta iti puruhUtamAha gUrta iti cCAndasaM rUpaM gUrRa iti tu BAzAyAm
'SmaSAnasaYcayopi garta ucyate guraterapagUrRo Bavati' (ni0 352) apagUrRa ucyata utTitaH
'na kadAcid dvije tasmAd vidvAnavaguredapi na tAqayettfRenApi…' (manu0 4169).. avaguret=hananecCayA daRqamudyacCet
'avagUrya tvabdaSataM sahasramaBihatya ca jiGAMsayA brAhmaRasya narakaM pratipadyate' (manu0 11206).. udito'rTaH
'brAhmaRAyAvaguryEva' (manu0 4165)
'dvirAgUrya mEtrAvaruRo dviH prezyati' (E0 brA0 228)
'puroqASaM pacatyaM juzasvendrAgurasva ca' (f0 3522) Agurasva=anumanyasva
'A ca SAssvA ca gurasva' (vA0 saM0 2161) Agurasva=udyacCa DAtvarTa evAnuvfttaH
'dEvIM vAcaM dunduBa Agurasva' (aTarva0 5204) uktacara evArTaH
'sarvAByo vA eza devatAByaH sarveByaH pfzWeBya AtmAnamAgurate yaH satrAyAgurate' (tE0 brA0 1477)
'CedArTamAgUrRaparaSvaDAnAm' (avadA0 viSva0 jA0 40) udyatasvaDitInAmityAha aDikftya prastutya AgUryetyarTa iti aDikftya kfte granTe (4387) ityatra kASikA
'sarvAByo vA eza devatAByaH sarveByaH pfzWeBya AtmAnamAgurate yaH satrAyAgurate' (tE0 brA0 1477) Agurute saMkalpayati pustake nyastapUrvamapIdaM vaco'nUdyate'rTanirdeSAya
'yadvo devAsa Agure yajYiyAso havAmahe' (tE0 saM0 121) Agure karmodyoge
'CAyAtaroH svAduPalapradasya cCedArTamAgUrRaparaSvaDAnAm DAtrI na lajjAM yadupEti BUmi rvyaktaM tadasyA hftacetanatvam' (AryaSUrakftAyAM jAtakamAlAyAm).. AgUrRaparaSvaDA udyatasvaDitayaH
'mugo nASno ati yajjuguryAt' (f0 11732) atijuguryAt AkroSet (hfzwaH san)
'udagurizata drumAn' (Bawwi0 1534) udayacCanta udakzipanniti vA
'nama udguramARAya cABiGnate ca' (vA0 saM0 1646) tarjanapUrvakaM vAcamudIrayamARAya
'citrezvapyudgUrRA nipatitASca prahArA dfSyante' (pA0 3126 sUtraBAzye) udgUrRA utTitA aByutTitAH
'kroDodgIrRagadasya' (veRI0 612) udgUrRA udyatA
'udgUrRe praTamo daRqaH saMsparSe tu tadarDikaH' (yAjYa0 2215) udgUrRe prahArArTamudyate daRqAdO
'aBI no agna ukTamijjuguryAH' (f0 114013) aBijuguryAH=aBinandeH=anumanyeTAH=saharzaM pratIcCeH
'izwaM bItamaBigUrtaM vazawkftaM taM devAsaH pratigfBRantyaSvam' (f0 116215) aBigUrtaM praSastamaBinanditam
'uto tezAmaBigUrtirna invatu' (f0 1162 12) aBigUrtiH stutiH
